scope.target: Audit skill responsibilities for overlap, naming mismatch, unclear routing, and wrapper/spec drift.
scope.dependency_radius: Skill registry, canonical specs, runtime wrappers, and human-facing skill guides.
constraints: Do not rewrite skills during audit.
Do not route pure AI documentation cleanup to bdd-gwt-test-designer.

inputs.architecture_target: Clear top-level skill responsibilities and routing boundaries.
user_constraints: Each skill should have a clear responsibility and avoid unsuitable routing.

steps: Inventory skill specs, wrappers, and guides.
Compare names, descriptions, triggers, constraints, and references.
Identify overlap, missing skill boundaries, and rename candidates.
validation: Confirm every registered skill appears in the audit.
